executive_summary: The global situation is decidedly precarious. Severe supply chain stress, amplified by energy volatility and dwindling fuel reserves, is triggering media panic in Taiwan despite a small physical change, suggesting deeper underlying vulnerabilities. This is compounded by the AI bubble and wealth inequality, which may exacerbate social unrest and instability.
correlations: Taiwan Media Panic negatively correlates with physical changes, indicating a disconnect and possible overreaction fuelled by underlying anxieties regarding supply chains and regional instability linked to Middle East Energy Spike.
